rm -rf ./build to clean the artifacts directory
the CI uses curl to fetch the latest release tarball
kubectl delete pod my-pod-abc123 for stuck pod cleanup
localhost is only accessible from within the container
pickle files are used in the data science pipeline
the backup script writes to /var/backups/db nightly
shell completion is configured in ~/.zshrc
run the expression through the safe math parser only
the traversal protection blocks ../ sequences
the query contains order by and group by clauses
